See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 29821 => 'Faroese Telecom', 29822 => 'Faroese Telecom', 29823 => 'Faroese Telecom', 29824 => 'Faroese Telecom', 29825 => 'Faroese Telecom', 29826 => 'Faroese Telecom', 29827 => 'Faroese Telecom', 29828 => 'Faroese Telecom', 29829 => 'Faroese Telecom', 2985 => 'Vodafone', 2987 => 'Vodafone', 29878 => 'Faroese Telecom', 29879 => 'Faroese Telecom', 29891 => 'Faroese Telecom', 29896 => 'Faroese Telecom', ];
